completed_slice: Added and locally tested a deterministic secret-free preflight evidence builder that binds repository environment requirements to workflow declarations without overstating deployment readiness.
remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secrets, followed by an exact-commit workflow dispatch and retained deployment proof.
next_action: Wire the preflight builder into the deployment workflow before readiness probing, upload its packet with the existing evidence bundle, then dispatch after environment configuration is present.
